skill.name: maxart-creative-studio
skill.description: Turn a product brief, campaign idea, or reference image into MaxArt-ready image and video prompt packs, shot lists, style directions, and creative variation plans.
skill.summary: Generate production-ready creative prompts for MaxArt.ai image and video generation from briefs and references.
skill.author: jerrylearner187

security_audit.summary: All 15 static analysis findings are false positives. Hardcoded URLs are documentation links. Backtick patterns are markdown formatting, not shell execution. No cryptographic code, system reconnaissance, or network calls exist in the skill. The skill is a text-based creative writing assistant that generates prompts for MaxArt.ai image and video generation with no code execution capabilities.

content.user_title: Generate MaxArt.ai creative prompts from briefs
content.value_statement: Marketing teams and creators struggle to write effective AI image generation prompts. This skill transforms product briefs and campaign ideas into structured, MaxArt-ready prompt packs with variations and production notes.
actual_capabilities: Convert product briefs into structured image generation prompts
Create video motion guidance from static reference images
Generate campaign packs with multiple creative variations
Write negative constraints to avoid common AI generation failures
Adapt prompts for different aspect ratios and platforms
Provide production notes for iterative testing in MaxArt.ai
limitations: Cannot directly render images or videos in MaxArt.ai
Does not access or process actual image files
Requires user to manually copy prompts into MaxArt.ai
Cannot guarantee specific MaxArt.ai feature availability

use_cases.title: Ecommerce product photography
use_cases.description: Generate hero shots and lifestyle images for product launches without hiring photographers or booking studio time.
use_cases.target_user: Ecommerce brand managers and marketing coordinators

use_cases.title: Social media ad creative packs
use_cases.description: Create multiple ad variations for A/B testing across platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook from a single brief.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and paid advertising specialists

use_cases.title: Concept visualization for client pitches
use_cases.description: Rapidly visualize creative concepts and mood boards for client presentations before committing to production.
use_cases.target_user: Creative directors and advertising agency teams

prompt_templates.title: Basic product shot request
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a MaxArt prompt for a product hero shot. Product: [describe product]. Background style: [studio/gradient/outdoor]. Include lighting direction and composition notes.

prompt_templates.title: Lifestyle ad creative with variations
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a lifestyle ad prompt pack for [product] targeting [audience]. Include one core prompt, three variations with different environments, and negative constraints for common failures.

prompt_templates.title: Image-to-video motion guidance
prompt_templates.prompt: I have a static image of [describe image]. Generate motion guidance for converting this to video in MaxArt.ai. Specify camera movement, subject motion, background motion, pacing, and ending frame.

prompt_templates.title: Full campaign asset pack
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a complete campaign prompt pack for [product/brand] launching [campaign goal]. Include hero asset prompts, supporting social assets, short-form video concepts, per-channel adaptations, and a testing matrix showing what variables to change first.

output_examples.input: Wireless headphones product launch, premium positioning, target tech enthusiasts
output: Creative Direction: Premium minimalist hero shot showcasing product design excellence

Core Prompt: Sleek wireless headphones centered on matte black reflective surface, soft rim lighting from upper left, controlled key light revealing premium materials, shallow depth of field, commercial product photography, high-end tech launch aesthetic
Variation A: Same product on warm walnut surface with natural window light, lifestyle studio setting
Variation B: Product floating against gradient charcoal background with subtle particle elements, futuristic tech aesthetic
Negative Constraints: No distorted headband geometry, no asymmetrical ear cups, no text artifacts, no low-detail materials
Production Note: Test tighter crop for Instagram square format with product filling 70% of frame

output_examples.input: Fashion model portrait under neon signs, want subtle motion for Instagram story
output: Motion Concept: Cinematic push-in with environmental atmosphere
Opening Frame: Medium portrait of fashion model under vibrant neon signage at night
Camera Movement: Slow cinematic push-in with slight handheld drift for organic feel
Subject Motion: Subtle hair movement from gentle breeze, natural blinking, slight jacket shift
Background Motion: Neon reflections flickering on wet street surface, distant ambient movement
Pacing: Moody medium pacing over 8 seconds
Ending Frame: Confident close framing with subject making direct eye contact with camera
Variant Option: Increase background neon flicker intensity while keeping subject motion minimal

best_practices: Provide specific details about subject, lighting, and composition rather than vague style words
Include negative constraints to prevent common AI generation failures like distorted hands or warped geometry
Test one variable at a time when iterating on prompts to understand what drives results
anti_patterns: Using abstract praise words like 'amazing' or 'beautiful' without specifying visual changes
Stuffing every possible modifier into a single prompt instead of creating separate variations
Promising exact MaxArt.ai features or UI controls that may not exist or change over time

faq.question: What is MaxArt.ai and do I need an account?
faq.answer: MaxArt.ai is an AI image and video generation platform. You will need a MaxArt.ai account to render the prompts this skill generates. This skill helps you write effective prompts but does not connect directly to MaxArt.ai.

faq.question: Can this skill process my existing images?
faq.answer: This skill cannot directly access or process image files. However, you can describe your reference image and this skill will generate image-to-video motion guidance or stylized transformation prompts based on your description.

faq.question: What information should I include in my brief?
faq.answer: Include your goal, target audience, offer or message, platform, format, aspect ratio, visual style preferences, brand constraints, and call-to-action. The more specific you are, the more targeted the prompts will be.

faq.question: How many prompt variations should I test?
faq.answer: Start with 3-5 core variations that change only one or two dimensions at a time, such as environment, lighting mood, or camera distance. This helps you identify which variables drive the best results.

faq.question: Can this skill create prompts for video generation?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill can generate motion guidance for image-to-video conversion, short-form video ad concepts with shot-by-shot breakdowns, and camera movement directions for MaxArt.ai video features.

faq.question: What should I do if my generated images have artifacts or distortions?
faq.answer: Use the negative constraints pattern to specify what to exclude, such as distorted hands, extra fingers, warped geometry, or unreadable text. This skill includes negative constraint blocks with each prompt pack to address common failure modes.
